message:
fix: misc improvements across blocking pool, supervision, timeout, and tests

blocking_pool: Reduce test sleep from 5s to 200ms in
test_shutdown_and_wait_timeout_respected — the previous value caused
unnecessarily slow test execution without improving coverage.

supervision: Add CUSUM-style reset to RestartStormMonitor — when
log_e_value drops below zero (indicating prolonged low-intensity
period), reset to zero so the monitor reacts quickly to new storms
instead of requiring evidence to overcome accumulated negative drift.

timeout_future: Add `TimeoutFuture::with_time_getter()` constructor
that accepts an explicit time source function, enabling deterministic
testing with virtual clocks without relying on wall-clock progression.

replay_minimization_validation_contract: Update 4 test call sites to
use `.expect()` on the now-fallible `CrashPackBuilder::build()`, with
descriptive messages explaining why failure metadata is guaranteed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
